description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat and slightly angled roof, featuring prominent solar panels on two roof sections. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray color, contrasted by darker trim and roof elements. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically, with a main entrance visible at the front, flanked by a small porch area. The structure sits on a rectangular grassy plot, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and geometric forms. The roof overhangs slightly, providing shade to the windows and entryway. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with glass for the windows and metal for the roof and solar panels.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat and angled roofs, solar panels, large asymmetrical windows, and a light gray exterior with dark trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, small porch, and large windows with solar panels visible on the roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled roof sections and a mix of window sizes, with less visible entry detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a series of smaller windows and the full extent of the solar panels on the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage door, solar panels, and minimal window presence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and scattered windows
